items.subject: Set up a new time to follow up on your vehicle inquiry
items.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for reaching out! I'd like to schedule a follow-up call to discuss the options we reviewed. Please let me know what times work best for you this week.

Also, could you send over the latest pricing sheet?

items.subject: Re: Vehicle inspection report
items.body: Thanks for sending the inspection report. Everything looks good. I'll discuss with my partner and get back to you by end of day.
